completed_steps.summary: Classified as monolith with 1 part: extension (VS Code Extension, TypeScript/Preact)
Found 16 existing documentation files (README, AGENTS, CHANGELOG, scripts docs, infra docs)
Tech stack: TypeScript 5.9.x, Preact 10.x, esbuild 0.27.x, VS Code API 1.105.0+, Mocha+Sinon, semantic-release
Conditional analysis: state management (AppStateContext+SettingsManager), UI components (21 Atomic Design components, 11 hooks, 2 contexts), message-based API (WebviewMessage/ExtensionMessage)
Source tree documented with 11 critical folders annotated
Development guide written: prerequisites, build, test, conventions, git workflow, CI/CD
Architecture document written: service container, message passing, feature modules, build, testing, CI/CD, security
Supporting docs written: project-overview.md, source-tree-analysis.md, component-inventory.md, development-guide.md
Master index generated with links to all generated and existing docs
